/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libiceoryx_platform.so -o libiceoryx_platform.so CMakeFiles/iceoryx_platform.dir/linux/source/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iceoryx_platform.dir/linux/source/fnctl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iceoryx_platform.dir/linux/source/grp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iceoryx_platform.dir/linux/source/mman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iceoryx_platform.dir/linux/source/mqueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iceoryx_platform.dir/linux/source/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iceoryx_platform.dir/linux/source/unistd.cpp.o  -lrt -lpthread
